items.title: Leavitt unloads on Obama over voter ID push, accuses Dems of 'panic'
items.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt criticizes former President Barack Obama for opposing voter ID laws after House passes SAVE Act.

items.title: US lawmakers warn Taiwan to ‘meet the moment’ as China stages invasion-style drills
items.description: Bipartisan U.S. lawmakers warn Taiwan's political gridlock over defense spending could undermine deterrence as China escalates military pressure.
